MOTION TO COMPEL DEPOSITION OF EXPERT WITNESS
Off Calendar Apr-24-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Michael F. O'leary for defendant and moving party: Lazar Ralko
Jessica Holcombe Plaintiff and opposing party in propria persona (TELEPHONIC APPEARANCE)

HEARING HELD and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Lazar Ralko's motion to compel the attendance of plaintiff at deposition is granted. The parties are ordered to meet and confer as to scheduling the deposition at a mutually convenient time. The deposition is to be completed within 30 days of notice of this order. Failure to appear for deposition was a misuse of the discovery process. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $669.95 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-22-2006 Assigned To Arbitration On Jun-05-06; Pre-Arbitration Settlement Conference On Jul-10-06 At 11:00 A.M.
